entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS662) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION OF MNS FEATURE PRICES AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU3309.01E.
2. ADDITION OF ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICES AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU3333.02E.
3. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
4. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS663) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: ADDS ONE (1) POLYCOM SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3457.01E. ADDS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET (SHARED 10MBPS ELECTRICAL INTERFACE) BY NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC) AND SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3399.01E. ADDS ONE (1) NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC) PRICE (MRC), AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3400.01E. ADDS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET (SHARED 200MBPS OPTICAL INTERFACE) BY SERVING WIRE CENTER, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3414.01E. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS664) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD TWO (2) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3348.01E. 2. CORRECTS THE JURISDICTION ID WHICH REQUIRES A TABLE CHANGE TO PREVIOUSLY AWARDED AU3228.01S/PS637, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3430.01S. 3. ADD CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3327.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF CCS AND DHS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3366.01E. 2. ADDITION OF CSDES CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3372.01E. 3. ADDITION OF CSDES CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3386.01E. 4. REDUCE PRICES FOR IPS CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3429.01P. 5. REDUCE PRICE FOR ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3434.01P. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3450.01E. 2. ADDITION OF SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3458.01E. 3. ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY NSC, SWC AND IPS DOMESTIC PORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3392.01E. 4. REDUCE PRICE FOR MTIPS PORTS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3416.01P. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS671) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: ADDS TWO (2) WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3456.01E. CORRECTS THE CLIN FREQUENCY AND CLIN DESCRIPTIONS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3419.01S. ADDS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET (SHARED 4MBPS ELECTRICAL INTERFACE) BY NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC) AND SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3413.01E. ADDS ONE (1) SOLAR WINDS SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3455.01E. ADDS PRICES FOR A CRITICAL BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS 1000 MBPS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3436.01E. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: ADD ONE (1) NON DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMISSION AU3435.01E. ADD TEN (10) INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CASE(S, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMISSION AU3398.01E. ADD CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMISSION AU3452.01E. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
